creator: mats@dufberg.se
text:
This reports missing option in the man page of "pkg info" (pkg-info).

The option -I works with "pkg info" as with old pkg_info, but it is not documented in the man page.

The option is, however, listed in "usage":

# pkg info -h
pkg: illegal option -- h
Usage: pkg info <pkg-name>
       pkg info -a
       pkg info [-AbBDdefIklOqRrs] [-Cgix] <pkg-name>
       pkg info [-AbBDdfIlqRrs] -F <pkg-file>

For more information see 'pkg help info'.
